notes: PG-184 — Deal Settings page at /deals/deal-settings (moved under deals/(list)/ so DealSettingsSidebarNav renders). 7-card bento grid per playbook §1: Pipeline Stages (REUSES pipelineConfigRouter — no duplication), Win/Loss Reasons (grouped WON/LOST CRUD + soft-delete), Scoring Rules (runtime delivered by IFC-312), Duplicate Detection (superRefine dedup on field+strategy pairs), Required Fields (accountId + ownerId locked), Tags (forwardRef<TagsTabHandle> + useImperativeHandle + 18-token color swatch with slate fallback), Automation (16 toggles across 5 sections + highValueThreshold). New dealSettingsRouter registered in apps/api/src/router.ts under dealSettings. Runtime wiring: deal-automation.ts is the category-1 consumer; opportunity.router.ts create/update/delete call loadDealAutomation → capitalizeDealName / normalizeDealValue / assertCanCreateDealOrMerge / assertCanDeleteDeal / notifyDealDuplicate / notifyDealReassignment / notifyDealStageChange / notifyHighValueStageMove. notifyDealReassignment helper is wired but effectively inert until IFC-311 adds an ownerId reassign endpoint (updateOpportunitySchema does not expose ownerId today). 6 new Prisma models (DealWinLossReason, DealScoringRule, DealDuplicateRule, DealRequiredField, DealTag, DealAutomationSetting) + hardening migration (CHECK on deal_tags.colorToken and deal_win_loss_reasons.category + AI-default restatements). 4 new NOTIFICATION_TYPES (deal_reassigned, deal_stage_changed, deal_high_value_moved, deal_duplicate_suspected). 3 old top-level stubs deleted; deal-stages + deal-automation moved under (list)/ as redirects to #pipeline / #automation; /settings/deals legacy redirect. Settings sidebar + settings-search (Core CRM) both carry a Deals entry. IFC-310 + IFC-312 Sprint_plan.csv artifact columns appended with 2 enforcer paths and 6 AI chain paths respectively; follow_ups.md sidecar enumerates all four follow-ups. 4 mandatory validations pass: TypeScript (turbo FULL TURBO), tests (200 opportunity + 123 validator + 29 web/deals + 25 wiring smoke = 377 green across touched suites), lint (0 errors on @intelliflow/web/api/validators/db; unrelated warnings only), build (web + api + validators + db all succeed, 4 deal-settings routes present in Next.js route manifest). lighthouserc.js updated to include /deals/deal-settings — Lighthouse CI runs on PR via lhci, not locally here. Plan checkboxes: 78/78 complete. All 11 completion gates pass.
